title: ElevenLabs S2S
description: Shortcut for 'llm' with vendor automatically set to 'elevenlabs'. Connects the caller to an ElevenLabs Conversational AI agent for real-time speech-to-speech voice conversation. Unlike other s2s vendors, ElevenLabs requires a pre-configured agent_id rather than a model and messages.

vendor.description: The LLM vendor (always 'elevenlabs' for this shortcut).

auth.description: Authentication credentials for ElevenLabs. Requires agent_id; api_key is optional (if not provided, an unsigned URL is used).

agent_id.description: The ElevenLabs Conversational AI agent ID. Required.

api_key.description: The ElevenLabs API key. Optional; when provided, a signed URL is used for the WebSocket connection.

llmOptions.description: Options for the ElevenLabs conversation session.

conversation_initiation_client_data.description: Optional data sent to the agent when the conversation starts.

input_sample_rate.description: Audio input sample rate in Hz.

output_sample_rate.description: Audio output sample rate in Hz.
